title: Kacy's Cosmetics
description: Adds over 120+ new cosmetics. Some can even glow and play music!
body:
![Cosmetics Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7462804a864620f3a066585dc3d1f6c861a706f0.png)
![Cosmetics About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f9197617cdab66fd3f8ad0434331eeb0a8174ae.png)

This is a creative mod that offers 120+ cosmetic hats and items that the player can wear. They do not offer any stats or special abilities. This mod was made as a way to help servers encourage donations. Therefore, none of the hats can be obtained in survival.

![Cosmetics Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b5b52dec7a28744e0093366761a75257c7dc324.png)

Right click with a glow token and keep it in your inventory to glow in any color hue.

Headphones will play tunes to all players within 10 blocks of the player.

Some of the hats feature mobs from Alex's Mobs such as the Blobfish and Warped Mosco.

Check the images tab to view them all!

![BH Promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19f5959a13c50c52771940879915bbba6b38c04b.png)
[https://www.bisecthosting.com/selector](https://www.bisecthosting.com/selector)
